page.partners.title: Partner program — earn recurring commission | Persistent Cart
page.partners.desc: Recommend a one-click Shopify app that fixes a hidden revenue leak with zero customer disruption — and earn recurring commission. For agencies, developers, affiliates, and consultants.
page.partners.h1: Earn 30% recurring commission — for a full year — on every Shopify store you refer.
page.partners.lede: Persistent Cart is one of the easiest recommendations you can make: one click to install, nothing changes for shoppers, and a hidden cross-device cart leak stops. Built for Shopify, trusted since 2016. Recommend it and earn recurring commission on every store you bring. The rates below are our early-partner terms — we confirm your final terms in writing before you start.
partners.earnings.title: What it adds up to
partners.earnings.body: Commission is recurring, so it compounds. Refer one Shopify Plus store and you earn about $30/month for 12 months — roughly $360 from a single referral. Advanced stores earn you ~$7.50/month, and Basic and Grow stores pay you every month they stay. Bundle it into the builds you already ship, and a book of 30–40 client stores becomes a meaningful, hands-off recurring line each year.
partners.why.title: Why promote Persistent Cart
partners.why.1.title: Recurring commission
partners.why.1.body: Earn {pct}% recurring commission for {months} months on every paying store you refer — not a one-time bounty.
partners.why.2.title: A genuinely easy recommendation
partners.why.2.body: One click, no theme code, no customer disruption. There's almost nothing to object to — it just stops a leak most owners didn't know they had.
partners.why.3.title: It makes your clients more money
partners.why.3.body: Recovered cross-device carts mean more completed orders. You look good because the stores you touch perform better.
partners.why.4.title: A 10-year track record behind you
partners.why.4.body: You're recommending the original, most-reviewed cross-device cart app for Shopify — Built for Shopify, 4.8★, running since 2016 — not an untested 2025 clone.

partners.terms.commission.label: Recurring commission
partners.terms.duration.label: Commission duration

partners.terms.provisional: These are early-partner terms — we'll confirm your final terms in writing, and lock them in, before you start.
partners.how.title: How it works
partners.how.1.title: Apply
partners.how.1.body: Tell us how you reach Shopify merchants. Approval is quick for agencies, developers, creators, and consultants.
partners.how.2.title: Get your link & kit
partners.how.2.body: We send your referral link plus a ready-to-use promo kit — logos, copy, and the calculator and free-audit tools to share.
partners.how.3.title: Recommend it
partners.how.3.body: Share it with clients or your audience. Installs through your link are tracked to you.
partners.how.4.title: Earn
partners.how.4.body: Get paid recurring commission for every paying store you bring, for {months} months each.
partners.audiences.title: Who this is for
partners.audiences.1: Shopify agencies, freelancers & developers who set up and manage client stores
partners.audiences.2: Affiliates, content creators & review sites in the Shopify ecosystem
partners.audiences.3: Consultants & educators who advise merchants on conversion and retention
partners.kit.title: What you get to promote with
partners.kit.1: Brand logos and approved copy snippets
partners.kit.2: The lost-cart calculator as a shareable tool
partners.kit.3: The free store-audit offer to warm up your audience
partners.kit.4: A clear, true story: the cross-device cart gap and the one-click fix
partners.form.title: Apply to the partner program
partners.form.name: Your name
partners.form.reach: Audience size or # of client stores (optional)
partners.form.privacy: We use these details only to review your application and get in touch. No spam.
partners.form.success.heading: Application received — thank you!
partners.form.success.body: We'll review your application and get back to you with your referral link, the promo kit, and the finalized terms. Talk soon.
partners.faq.q1.q: How does commission tracking work for a Shopify app?
partners.faq.q1.a: Your referral link tags installs that come through you, and our system attributes paying stores back to your account. Because billing runs through Shopify, we confirm conversions on each successful charge — so you're credited for stores that actually stick.
partners.faq.q2.q: When and how do I get paid?
partners.faq.q2.a: You're paid monthly through FirstPromoter once you clear a small minimum payout — recurring for {months} months on each paying store you refer. We confirm the exact schedule when you're approved.
partners.faq.q3.q: Is there any cost to join?
partners.faq.q3.a: No. Joining the partner program is free. You earn commission on the stores you bring — there's no fee and no minimum.
partners.faq.q4.q: Can I bundle it into the stores I build for clients?
partners.faq.q4.a: Yes — that's one of the best fits. Agencies and developers install it as part of a build and earn recurring commission while making the store perform better. Always disclose affiliate relationships per the usual guidelines.
partners.affiliatesCta: Just looking to share a link with an audience? See the affiliate program.
